name: obsidian-oss-gallery
description: Upload and manage media and documents across multiple OSS providers for Obsidian.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['dist','main.js']) fs.rmSync(p,{ recursive:true, force:true });" && node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const p of ['dist','main.js']) fs.rmSync(p,{ recursive:true, force:true });"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
